common.tagline: Visual workflow automation with a real engine
common.name: Name
common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

landing.heroBadge: Real execution engine, not a mockup
landing.heroLead: Fluxo is a visual automation builder where every node really runs. Drag triggers and actions onto a blueprint canvas, connect them, and ship workflows that fetch APIs, branch on conditions, write to datastores and fire notifications.
landing.graphCaption: A token flowing trigger → action → branch, executed live.
landing.featuresLead: No black boxes. Inspect every run down to each node's input and output.
landing.feature1Body: Manual, inbound webhook, and cron schedule triggers. Each workflow gets a unique webhook URL and a timezone-aware next-run.
landing.feature2Body: HTTP requests, set-fields, if-branches, append-row, notify, delay and a safe code node - composed on a React Flow canvas.
landing.feature3Body: Reference upstream output with '{{' $json.field '}}' and '{{' $node["Name"] '}}'. No eval - a hand-written, safe resolver.
landing.feature4Body: Every execution stores ordered node runs with input, output, error and duration. Replay and debug like a stack trace.
landing.feature5Body: Persist rows in dynamic tables and reuse API base URLs and headers across HTTP nodes.
landing.feature6Body: A blueprint canvas built dark-first, fully responsive, in English, Spanish and Portuguese.
landing.nodesLead: Triggers start a run; actions transform and route the data.
landing.engineStep1: A trigger fires with a payload
landing.engineStep2: The engine walks the graph, edge by edge
landing.engineStep3: Each node resolves its config and runs for real
landing.engineStep4: Branches route on conditions; cycles are capped
landing.engineStep5: Every step is persisted for the inspector
landing.ctaTitle: Build your first workflow in a minute
landing.ctaLead: One click drops you into a fully seeded demo account. No signup.
landing.footerNote: Fluxo - a portfolio build. Visual automation with a real backend engine.

auth.loginSubtitle: Pick a one-click demo, or use your credentials.
auth.demoSectionHint: No signup - a real, fully seeded session.
auth.name: Full name
auth.demoFailed: Could not open the demo session. Try again.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Build, activate and run your automations.
workflows.emptyHint: Create your first workflow to wire a trigger to a chain of actions.
workflows.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the workflow and all of its executions.
workflows.newModalHint: It starts with a manual trigger node. You can change everything in the editor.

executions.title: Executions
executions.subtitle: Every run of every workflow, with full step traces.
executions.emptyHint: Run a workflow to see its execution history here.
executions.noSteps: This run produced no node steps.

datastores.title: Datastores
datastores.subtitle: Dynamic tables your workflows write into.
datastores.emptyHint: Append-row nodes will create datastores automatically, or make one here.
datastores.rows: {count, plural, =0 {no rows} one {# row} other {# rows}}
datastores.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the table and all of its rows.
datastores.noRows: This table has no rows yet
datastores.noRowsHint: Rows appear when a workflow's append-row node runs.
datastores.newModalHint: Name it to match what your append-row nodes target.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Messages emitted by your notify nodes.
notifications.emptyHint: Notify nodes deliver inbox, Slack, WhatsApp and email messages here.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Reusable API base URLs and headers for HTTP nodes.
connections.emptyHint: Save a base URL and auth headers once, then reference it from any HTTP node.
connections.headersHint: Sent with every request that uses this connection.
connections.deleteBody: HTTP nodes referencing this connection will lose its base URL and headers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your profile and preferences.
settings.emailReadonly: Your email can't be changed in the demo.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Platform-wide overview across all users.
admin.deniedHint: You need an admin account to view this page.
admin.recentEmpty: No executions across the platform yet.

trigger.manual: Start a run by hand with a sample payload.
trigger.webhook: Run when an HTTP request hits the workflow URL.
trigger.schedule: Run on a cron schedule in a timezone.

action.http: Make a real HTTP request and capture the response.
action.setFields: Build a new object from resolved fields.
action.if: Branch the flow on one or more conditions.
action.appendRow: Append a row to a datastore table.
action.notify: Send an inbox, Slack, WhatsApp or email message.
action.delay: Pause the run for a number of seconds.
action.code: Resolve a JSON template with expressions.

nodes.noSelection: Select a node to configure it.
nodes.name: Node name

editor.emptyCanvas: Drag a node from the palette to start.

editor.webhookHint: Send a POST (or GET) request here to trigger this workflow while it is active.
editor.mobileHint: Compact editor - open on a wider screen for the full canvas.
